name: T-5 ts eval specs: positive fixture .ts files are non-empty so they exercise the detector against real source content
command: missing=0; for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/fixtures/typescript"/g-ts-*/positive; do [ -d "$d" ] || continue; for f in "$d"/*.ts; do [ -s "$f" ] || missing=$((missing+1)); done; done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo non_empty 1>&2
